creator: martinp@tildeslash.com
text:
Created attachment 162475
patch

In monit 5.15 the connection parameters preceding the generic send/expect test cause syntax error, the attached patch ported from upstream (https://bitbucket.org/tildeslash/monit/commits/93afc865d98ce46b6f7b5a8e0a835f1343cf7723) fixes the problem.
